summary: Frontend testing for 4 features: (1) Customer company conditional rendering - VERIFIED in CustomerDrawer360, (2) CRM Kanban text wrapping - VERIFIED in CRMPageV2 Kanban view (QuoteKanbanPage exists but NOT ROUTED), (3) Vendor supply review - VERIFIED allocated_quantity and base_cost in AdminProductApprovalPage drawer, (4) Marketplace image resolution - VERIFIED ProductCardCompact resolves URLs correctly. Admin orders table-fixed confirmed.

ui_bugs.issue: Page exists at /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/QuoteKanbanPage.jsx but is NOT imported or routed in App.js. Route /admin/quote-kanban shows empty content area.

action_items: Add QuoteKanbanPage import and route to App.js if the standalone Kanban page is needed (currently CRM page has Kanban view toggle that works)
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerDrawer360.jsx: isIndividual check at line 85 correctly hides Company field in Profile section (line 111) and header (line 193-195)
CustomerSummaryCard.jsx: isIndividual check at line 6 hides TIN/BRN section for individual customers (line 50-63)

QuoteKanbanPage.jsx: QuoteCard uses break-words line-clamp-2 for customer name (line 102), truncate for company (line 106), shows assigned_sales_name (lines 130-134), drawer shows 'Individual' instead of 'No company' (line 227)
AdminProductApprovalPage.jsx: Table shows Cost and Qty columns (lines 224-225), drawer shows allocated_quantity and base_cost fields (lines 269-272, 309-313)
ProductCardCompact.jsx: resolveImageUrl function (lines 11-14) correctly handles storage paths and external URLs
MarketplaceCardV2.jsx: resolveImageUrl function (lines 8-11) correctly handles storage paths and external URLs
PartnerUnifiedTable.jsx: Shows vendor_type badge in Classification column (lines 59-60), star icon for preferred_partner (line 48)
OrdersPage.jsx: Uses table-fixed class for no horizontal scroll
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 features verified: (1) CustomerDrawer360 hides company for individual customers - working, (2) CRM Kanban at /admin/crm with Kanban view toggle shows cards with text wrapping - working, (3) AdminProductApprovalPage drawer shows allocated_quantity and base_cost - working, (4) ProductCardCompact and MarketplaceCardV2 resolve storage paths to /api/files/serve/ URLs - working. Note: QuoteKanbanPage.jsx exists but is not routed in App.js - the CRM page has a working Kanban view toggle instead.
